programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: As Season 5 begins, Red Bull Italy SailGP Team races against the clock to finish their boat and get their brand-new crew – led by Olympic gold medallist Ruggero Tita – trained and ready to compete.
programme.series-desc: Red Bull Italy SailGP Team races against the clock to finish their boat and get their crew trained to compete.

programme.title: Adventures Unpacked with Beau Miles
programme.sub-title: The rapid no woman had ever run – Nouria Newman
programme.desc: Nouria Newman shares how one adventure shaped her approach to expeditions. She and two friends kayaked one of the world's most challenging sections of whitewater: the Rondu Gorge in Pakistan.
programme.series-desc: Kayaking superstar Nouria Newman shares how an adventure in Pakistan shaped her approach to expeditions.

programme.title: Adventures Unpacked with Beau Miles
programme.sub-title: Landing on an active volcano – Tom de Dorlodot
programme.desc: Paraglider pilots Tom de Dorlodot and Horacio Llorens travel to Tanzania to learn about Masai tribe customs and fly on their sacred mountain, Ol Doinyo Lengai, an active volcano almost 3,000m high.
programme.series-desc: In Tanzania, Tom de Dorlodot and Horacio Llorens paraglide on an active volcano sacred to the Masai tribe.

programme.title: Adventures Unpacked with Beau Miles
programme.sub-title: Skiing the world's 6,000m peaks – Jérémie Heitz
programme.desc: Jérémie Heitz revisits his groundbreaking steep-skiing expeditions with Sam Anthamatten, journeys that took them across towering 6,000m peaks and some of the planet’s most formidable mountain ranges.
programme.series-desc: Jérémie Heitz revisits steep-skiing expeditions with Sam Anthamatten – across towering 6,000m peaks.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From freerunning Greek isles to skiing the Streif
programme.desc: A gnarly shipping container BMX set-up. Freerunning in Santorini. Taking on the Streif at night. Enduro riding on a volcano. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from skiing down the steepest run at night to slacklining during an eclipse.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: The Red Bull Soapbox Race 2024 in Hyderabad, India, unleashed a wave of chaos as teams navigated a unique, obstacle-filled track. Watch as gravity-powered vehicles race, flip and soar.
programme.series-desc: Red Bull Soapbox Race 2024 Hyderabad unleashed a wave of chaos as teams navigated the obstacle-filled track.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.sub-title: Best of Red Bull Soapbox Race part 2
programme.desc: Check out the most memorable moments of Red Bull Soapbox Race, from the impeccable driving skills to the high speed spills take look at weird and wonderful events around the globe.
programme.series-desc: Check out the best moments of Red Bull Soapbox Race, from the driving skills to the high speed spills.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: The Andes mountains provide a stunning backdrop to the Red Bull Soapbox Race in Santiago, Chile. Teams of brave racers try to be the fastest through the course filled with obstacles and hairpin turns.
programme.series-desc: Teams of intrepid soapbox racers test their skills in Santiago, Chile, on a steep and treacherous course.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: The streets of India's Mumbai were lined with 30,000 screaming fans as the Red Bull Soapbox Race hosted its first day-to-night contest. Crazy, creative, and colourful contraptions took on the course.
programme.series-desc: Thousands of frenzied fans swarmed to Mumbai, India, to watch brave soapbox racers compete all day and night.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Latest news and in-depth analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Determined to break the siege on Gaza, two filmmakers share their dramatic first-hand accounts aboard the Global Sumud Flotilla.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: People and Power
programme.desc: Keeping the Revolution alive. After Maduro's capture, we followed the people fighting for his return.
programme.series-desc:
People & Power is a current affairs programme on Al Jazeera English which broadcasts once a week, on Wednesdays, and repeated throughout the week.
Each half-hour programme features one investigative documentaries on an issue related to power from around the world. The programme occasionally has one hour specials.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A Palestinian family of peaceful activists in the occupied West Bank defend their community from settler expansion as violence intensifies.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A Palestinian family of peaceful activists in the occupied West Bank defend their community from settler expansion as violence intensifies.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A Palestinian family of peaceful activists in the occupied West Bank defend their community from settler expansion as violence intensifies.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?
